title: RecipeScalingCalculatorPayload
description: Schema describing input and output for the Recipe Scaling Calculator. Scales recipe ingredients and servings based on target portions, scale factor, and optional constraints from storehouse, time, and equipment.

recipeId.description: Optional identifier of the recipe from the Recipe Vault or import system.

recipeName.description: Human-readable name of the recipe. Used for display and logging.

baseServings.description: Number of servings that the original recipe is designed to produce.

targetServings.description: Desired number of servings after scaling. If null, scaleFactor must be provided.

scaleFactor.description: Explicit multiplier to apply to ingredient quantities. If provided, takes precedence over derived factor from targetServings.

roundingMode.description: How scaled ingredient quantities should be rounded: none (exact), friendlyKitchen (spoons/cups), storePackage (align with package sizes), fractionQuarter (nearest 0.25 unit).

maxScaleFactor.description: Optional upper bound on allowed scale factor to avoid extreme scaling.

minScaleFactor.description: Optional lower bound on allowed scale factor to avoid extreme downscaling.

respectInventory.description: If true, scaling will consider storehouse inventory and may reduce targetServings or flag shortages.

respectEquipmentLimits.description: If true, scaling will respect maximum equipment capacity (pans, pots, oven size, mixers).

respectTimeConstraints.description: If true, scaling will consider available time and may recommend multiple sessions or reduced batch size.

inventorySnapshot.description: Optional snapshot of current inventory to validate scaled ingredient requirements.

quantityAvailable.description: Quantity currently available in the storehouse.

unit.description: Measurement unit for quantityAvailable (g, ml, cup, piece, etc.).

equipmentConstraints.description: Optional equipment capacity limits that constrain scaling.

maxOvenTrays.description: Maximum number of trays that can fit in the oven at once.

maxPotVolumeLiters.description: Maximum useful volume for primary cooking pot or stock pot.

maxPanAreaSqIn.description: Maximum pan area in square inches for baking/roasting.

timeConstraints.description: Optional time constraints for the batch.

totalMinutesAvailable.description: Total number of minutes available for this cooking session.

allowMultipleSessions.description: If true, the calculator can suggest splitting into multiple sessions or batches.

householdContext.description: Optional household context for connecting to SSA planning and batch yield.

householdId.description: Identifier of the active household profile.

planningHorizonDays.description: Number of days this scaled recipe is meant to cover.

scaledServings.description: The final computed number of servings after applying the scale factor and constraints.

appliedScaleFactor.description: The actual factor applied to ingredient quantities, after enforcing min/max and constraints.

ingredients.description: List of ingredients with their base and scaled quantities.

ingredientId.description: Identifier linking to recipe ingredient or storehouse item mapping.

baseQuantity.description: Original quantity in the base recipe.

scaledUnit.description: Unit to use for scaledQuantity (may differ from baseUnit after unit normalization).

storehouseItemId.description: Linked storehouse item id, if available.

inventoryStatus.description: Whether inventory can fully cover the scaled quantity.

inventoryDelta.description: Quantity that will be consumed from inventory if this batch is executed, in scaledUnit (negative for consumption).

warnings.description: Any warnings or notes for this ingredient (e.g., out of stock, over equipment capacity, awkward fraction).

scalingWarnings.description: High-level warnings for the entire scaled recipe.

sessionsHints.description: Hints for downstream SessionRunner and batch yield, such as recommended batch splits.

recommendedBatchCount.description: Suggested number of batches to run based on equipment/time constraints.

estimatedTotalCookMinutes.description: Estimated total cook time for the scaled recipe, across all batches.

meta.title: RecipeScalingMeta
meta.description: Optional metadata used for logging and SSA analytics.

calculatorVersion.description: Implementation version for the scaling logic, used for analytics and debugging.

invokedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the calculation was invoked.

householdId.description: Household this calculation belongs to, if available.
